title: ChickenCow
description: A resourcepack with some simple stuff useful for an SMP or civilisation server
body: ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B6Jhw4Nm/images/fd582082582533a72932783fd2809bfe87329929.png) **ChickenCow**, a resourcepack focused mainly on quality-of-life while offering some unique stuff like the IKEA blåhaj plushie as a totem I've tried to also keep it compatible with [Trusted Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trusted-pack), I just have to hope that they don't add some music disc that I'm already using.. some of the features are: - base-10 enchant levels - base-10 potion potency - Blåhaj of undying - HD shield banners - lower shield - custom music discs - Teminite, BoomKitty, Waterflame & Autodidactic - Slash Inferno - Will Wood - BlackBoxWarrior - ミラクルミュージカル - Labyrinth - quieter boats - custom "joke" language: Epsteinian - improved UI for some mods - Shorter grass ## Dependencies - [ETF] Entity Texture Features ## 🖼️ Gallery ![shields](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B6Jhw4Nm/images/3cd716ade5811742779535fde9e87fc987a152c0.png) ![axolotls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B6Jhw4Nm/images/a70cd0288e39ed020eeeba31a9da18e1756fbeb1.png) ![totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B6Jhw4Nm/images/b86aa5ce4c617e5d62a4fb58c01decbe2895ed53.png) ![discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B6Jhw4Nm/images/c9d757842244014f6dcbacc2ff968169d8d7f33e.png) ![epsteinian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B6Jhw4Nm/images/5301e70c09f0ba524e64878128ddc3693144f642.png)
